response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the video: Shiranui Flare introduces her song choices and then plays 'Sakimori Renka' (防人恋歌) in the Pop'n Music game. 2. Identified the song title from on-screen text and gameplay as 'Sakimori Renka' (防人恋歌). 3. Searched for 'Sakimori Renka' (防人恋歌) artist and lyrics. Found it's by 'Ax feat. Yoko Natsukawa'. 4. Retrieved the original lyrics from RemyWiki. 5. Translated the lyrics to English for the final JSON. 6. Structured the response into two scenes: the intro talk (non-vocal) and the gameplay (vocal).
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTuber Shiranui Flare introducing and playing the Pop'n Music song 'Sakimori Renka' (防人恋歌).

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare introduces herself and talks about her song selections for her birthday festival, including 'Sakimori Renka'.
Shiranui Flare plays 'Sakimori Renka' in Pop'n Music. The vocal song is featured throughout this segment.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
闇に放り込んだ 想い届いていますか？

浅い夢の覚め際に毎日
伝う涙の理由はどこから

きっと戻ってくるよと
頬を撫でる手は冷たくて
ぎゅっと広い背中を抱きしめた

謳え謳え　通ひ路恋歌
たとえ声はしなくとも
届け届け 通ひ路恋歌
愛する人の為 ずっと笑顔で居るから

ずっと待っているよと
しがみつく手は震えてて
もっと強く深く深く抱きしめた

謳え謳え 通ひ路恋歌 たとえ声が枯れても
笑え笑え 通ひ路恋歌 暖かい陽はまだか！

ずっとずっと 謳えるのは
君の声がするから
届け届け 防人恋歌
愛する人の為 ずっと笑顔で居るから
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Are the feelings I threw into the darkness reaching you?

Every day at the edge of shallow dreams,
Where do the reasons for the tears flowing down come from?

'I'll surely come back,'
The hand stroking my cheek was cold,
I tightly hugged that broad back.

Sing, sing, Kayoiji Renka (Song of the Passing Road),
Even if your voice is gone,
Deliver, deliver, Kayoiji Renka,
For the sake of the person I love, I will always stay smiling.

'I'll be waiting forever,'
The hand I clung to was trembling,
I hugged you more strongly, deeper and deeper.

Sing, sing, Kayoiji Renka, even if your voice becomes hoarse,
Laugh, laugh, Kayoiji Renka, is the warm sun not here yet!

I can keep singing forever and ever,
Because I can hear your voice,
Deliver, deliver, Sakimori Renka (Song of the Guardian),
For the sake of the person I love, I will always stay smiling.
